steps.title: Spot the geographic shift
steps.content: The passage describes Monument 3 discovered at La Venta in Tabasco, then introduces Monument 53 at San Lorenzo in Veracruz. The key signal is the mention of two different archaeological sites in different regions.

steps.title: Match the location-transition word
steps.content: ”Elsewhere” indicates movement to a different place, which fits the shift between the two sites. The other choices wrongly imply causation, clarification, or categorical example-giving rather than a location shift. That matches choice D — D is correct.
